text: Airbnb, Inc. operates a two-sided marketplace platform that connects hosts offering stays and experiences with guests worldwide, primarily facilitating bookings for private rooms, primary homes, or vacation homes through online and mobile channels C002. The company, headquartered in San Francisco and led by CEO Brian Chesky, employs approximately 7,300 full-time employees and trades on NASDAQ under ticker ABNB C001. Revenue is generated through the marketplace model where the company takes a fee from bookings, with Q2 2025 revenue reaching $3.096B, representing 36.27% year-over-year growth from the prior year period K001.

Airbnb, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates a platform that enables hosts to offer stays and experiences to guests worldwide.
